body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `src/api/usageManagementContext.ts:37`
`const userAgentInfo = \`azsdk-js-arm-commerce/1.0.0-beta.1\`;`
The user-agent version `1.0.0-beta.1` does not match the package version `4.0.0-beta.4` declared in `package.json`. This is a generation tool bug that has persisted across previous regeneration attempts (PRs #37941 and #38015).
**Fix:** Update the user-agent string to `azsdk-js-arm-commerce/4.0.0-beta.4`, and report this issue in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

1 tool issue found. The API surface itself (naming, types, exports) looks good for this TypeSpec migration of `@azure/arm-commerce` to `4.0.0-beta.4`.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":38112,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/commerce/arm-commerce/src/api/usageManagementContext.ts","line":37,"issueType":"tool","category":"version-mismatch","description":"userAgentInfo hardcoded to azsdk-js-arm-commerce/1.0.0-beta.1 but package version is 4.0.0-beta.4; persisted from PRs #37941 and #38015"}]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- 🔴 **Tool Issue** — `src/api/usageManagementContext.ts:37`: `userAgentInfo` is hardcoded to `azsdk-js-arm-commerce/1.0.0-beta.1` but the package version is `4.0.0-beta.4`. This bug has persisted across PRs #37941 and #38015. Please report it in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues) and update the string to match the package version.
- ⏳ `js - pullrequest (Build UnitTest *)`: still running (all 4 environments).
- ℹ️ This PR is currently a **draft** — mark it as ready for review once CI passes and the version mismatch is resolved.
